services.title: Web Development
services.desc: Web development is the process of building, creating, and maintaining websites and web applications. It ranges from developing simple single static pages of plain text to complex web applications, electronic businesses, and social network services

experience.desc: Built and deployed interactive Power BI dashboards and real-time Splunk monitoring systems to enhance operational efficiency and facilitate data-driven decision-making.
Analyzed large datasets using SQL and Excel to extract actionable insights, enabling strategic decision-making for cross-functional business teams.
Contributed to the design and development of Autonomous VTOL Aircraft. Applied machine learning techniques using Python and R.

projects.title: OTT Merger Analysis
